sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, array1 Array(Int32), array2 Array(Int32));
UPDATE test_arrays SET array2 = [6, 7, 8] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT hasAny(array1, array2) AS has_intersection FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hasAny(array1, array2) FROM test_arrays WHERE hasAny(array1, array2) = 1;
